headline: Renewable Energy
description: Renewable energy comes from naturally replenishing sources: solar (photovoltaic: sunlight→electricity), wind (turbines), hydropower (dams), geothermal (Earth's heat), biomass, tidal. Solar and wind are now cheaper than fossil fuels in most of the world (LCOE). Transition challenge: intermittency — storage (batteries, pumped hydro) and grid modernization needed.
